chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-948 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 4016/2023 3.For hearing of main case 16-08-2023 None present for the petitioner. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received. Even otherwise, we have gone through the memo of petition and are of the view that the petition is not maintainable. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
